song.title: O Holy Night
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C2
song.lyrics:
[V1] .C O holy night, . F C The stars are brightly shining; . G7 C It is the night of the dear Savior's birth.|| .C Long lay the world . F C C7 In sin and sorrow pining, . Em Till He appeared . B7 Em And the soul felt its worth. . G7 C A thrill of hope, the weary world rejoices, . G7 C For yonder breaks a new and glorious morn.
[C] .Am Em Fall on your knees, . Dm Am O hear the angel voices. . C G7 C F O night divine, . C G7 C O night when Christ was born. . G7 C F O night divine, . C G7 C O night when Christ was born. --- [V2] Led by the light of faith serenely beaming, With glowing hearts by His cradle we stand.|| So led by light of a star sweetly gleaming, Here came the wise men from Orient land. The King of Kings lay thus in lowly manger, In all our trials born to be our friend!
[V3] Truly He taught us to love one another; His law is love and His gospel is peace.|| Chains shall He break for the slave is our brother And in His name all oppression shall cease. Sweet hymns of joy in chorus raise we, Let us praise His holy name!
[C2] Christ is the Lord, His name forever praise ye, His power and glory ever more proclaim His power and glory ever more proclaim
